steps: Go to https://app.launchdarkly.com and sign in to your account
Click the gear icon in the left navigation to open Organization settings
Enter a name for the token (e.g. 'API Integration')
Select a role for the token (Reader, Writer, Admin, or custom role)
Optionally check 'This is a service token' for long-term integrations (Enterprise plans only)
Copy the token immediately — it will not be shown again
notes: Free trial and Pro plans support personal access tokens
Service tokens (for server-side integrations) require an Enterprise plan
Token is shown only once — copy it immediately after creation
Token permissions are scoped by the role assigned at creation time
The Authorization header does NOT use a prefix — send the token directly (not 'Bearer token')

test_endpoint.description: List all projects in the account
